item.title: Culture is made out of stories that we tell to ourselves.
item.dc:creator: Az663

item.title: My English Wife was homesick, so I built her a traditional English Pub for her birthday…
item.description:
How it started…as a workshop/catchall storage space
A blank canvas…
Levelling the floors as best as I can ( without tearing them all up…I’m on a budget)
Rotten crossbeams that are too low…( replaced with cedar and lifted 6 inches)
Pine 2x4s and insulation ( don’t know why I took the picture or why I’m posting it…)
New lifted crossbeams and insulated walls
Painted the outside…
And the front ( Don’t worry, I added two more coats…)
First time I’ve ever put up drywall ( and it shows) in my defence, the structure was over 80 yrs old and didn’t have one true corner)
Bought $100 bar on marketplace
Starting to get there…
Optics and ?
First pint…
Lights , mirror and Scampi fries
Front is done ( including the cctv which is a very traditional touch for an authentic English pub)
Comfortable chair, roaring fire and the Pub’s first regular…
Ready for the grand opening
Nearly there….
Table for two?
And a table for four
Welcome to the Mutt and Roses ( Ontario, Canada)
item.dc:creator: hoistedbymyownpetard

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i'd be a little intimidated tbh... greetings online friends
po-tay-toes
british acting truly is top notch
but where do they get water?
those ears
i would die for Miss Peanut
it's never too early
better puncture all the golf cart tires you see just to be safe
i used to do this, have relaxed a little
we've all done this
tough to beat the Turtles w/ Vanilla Ice
finally
so 2 is the limit
damn, i only have 226 litres of dirty water
mmm hmm
who's
please don't look at any other memes gang
that's it for me... have a great weekend, gang!!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Well said, it's disgusting that it needs to be heard, but it does.
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: My Top 10 female Assassin Movies you should watch
item.description:
#10 With a cool Japanese vibe and a predictable but well executed twist, Kate is a vibrant, dark offering with some solid performances.
#9 I'll be honest, I'm a little biased because I'm a huge Jennifer Lawrence fan. Although this isn't her best performance, the supporting cast helps carry the movie and it's an enjoyable watch.
#8 Angelina Jolie is cast perfectly here. They keep you guessing until the end about her loyalties. It was a low budget sleeper with little promotion but totally worth the watch.
#7 Okay, I'll be honest, it's a little dated and super cheesy. Still, it's a fun romp and worth it just to see Samuel L. Jackson before he was a superstar. Plus, the chemistry between him and Geena Davis plays really well. Fun fact, her husband at the time, Remy Harland was the director and made her do a scene where she jumped in an icy lake over and over and possibly contributed to their subsequent divorce.
#6 Solid performances all around. A little predictable and a little cheesy but with some fun action scenes and a dark melancholy that only Jessica Chastain can bring.
#5 So good that they made a TV series (that basically followed the movie). The fact that the protagonist was so young yet so skilled adds a little something extra.
#4 Set in 1980's Berlin just before the fall of the Berlin Wall, this is more of a spy movie than a female Assassin film but executive producer Charlize Theron along with co-star James McAvoy deliver Rock solid performances. Honestly, you should watch this movie for the soundtrack alone.
#3 This is the gold standard, the film that inspired the genre. This is another one that birthed a TV series and countless copycats, remakes, and spin-offs. This is female badass at it's finest.
#2 Honestly, this was the film that inspired this post. It's so good that I i almost made it number one. Just a solid film start to finish. Sure, some of the action scenes are a little overindulgent but still a whole lot of fun to watch. The story is told well, the performances are great and the protagonist is compelling and believable. If you haven't seen this one, I highly recommend it.
#1 was there any doubt that this would be number one? I mean, Tarantino, fantastic cast, solid trilogy. If you want to see a badass female kicking ass, getting revenge, within the landscape of incredible, unique, beautiful filmmaking, there is no better female assassin movie. Obviously these are just my opinions and I anticipate some spirited debate. Hopefully though, I'll introduce some people to movies that they might otherwise have missed. I'm an old, cis, white man but there is something so satisfying about watching a badass woman slay her enemies. This might be my all time favorite genre of movie.
item.dc:creator: meme2theextreme

item.title: "Too Many Topics for Title" Meme Dump
item.description:
Priorities.
Just your average snow day in the Midwest..
My new garden flag was delivered on the perfect week. We stuck a yardstick in the snow. We are up to 20 inches and still going.
item.dc:creator: Unplugg3dToast3r

item.title: Winter Storm Boredom Dump
item.dc:creator: chicharrone

item.title: The joy of winter operations in the airline business.
item.description: A coworker and fellow Aircraft Maintenance Engineer in Edmonton shared this to me today and gave me permission to share on Imgur. It was -52c last night when the crew had to push out a couple of planes. (EDIT: I went with -52c because my buddy put that into the video. After checking yesterdays official weather, it was about -45c with wind chill, which affects skin but not the metal on the planes. It's still too damn cold). Everything needs to be well coordinated because leaving the hangar door open for too long will cause pipes to freeze and burst. As you can see from all of the gear that he is putting on, it takes a lot to be outside and working on the planes. The fog is caused by the rapid temperature change as its about 20c inside...a 70-ish degree temperature change. The next time that you are flying remember that there is a team of highly skilled people trying to keep the planes safe while trying hard not to get frost bite. Front Page Edit: Thanks for the updoots! I was told that it was -52c up in Edmonton, but it was actually closer to -37c with the wind chill of -45 last night. The -52 was in the actual video, so I went with that (and someone pointed out that it was probably -52F, not Celsius, which makes more sense). The wind chill is important to know so that you keep your skin covered to avoid freezing it and getting frost bite. I am not the author of the video, it was the guy in the video who shot it, so I am going by what he said. Stay warm fellow aviation peeps working out on the ramp in this cold! Here is the guy in the video's (Aaron) IG account: https://www.instagram.com/adrenaline_junkies_adventures/?igsh=MWh4bWIyMXd1ZTFlOQ%3D%3D&utm_source=qr
item.dc:creator: Travelcedric

item.dc:creator: rockyandchloe

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1078
item.description:
Good morning! I slept even more wretchedly than usual, thanks to my first case of heartburn in months, and with nary anything to take as a neutralizing agent. Half of the night I was sitting upright in bed, eyes closed, lamenting habenero-mango hot wings that i ate what should have been too early in the day to cause such madness. Let's get this bread.
Malört has to be one of the most, uh, interesting things I've ever tasted.
Oops.
Me, always, and the birds too. Also big @sisipherr vibes here.
Mood.
Yeah, despite being an Arizona Dirtbag like Elanor, I think I identified most with Janet on this show.
BUT I HAVE WORKING INTERNET NOW HOLY SHIT
That's awkward.
So give me my heart back, you Pet'aQ. (There are days I'm tempted to message that to my last ex, but she wouldn't get it. She hated Star Trek. I can't figure out why she still has this stupid hold on me in some moments, and it's annoying af because I really am trying to move on with my life two years after the whole thing. It's especially annoying because even if she were to come crawling back, I wouldn't even take her back, I know better. Stupid emotions. I wish I was Vulcan, so I could do that ritual that effectively silences them forever.)
There's always the ads for Safeway I get on newsprint still.
The Chola Empire is probably the most powerful Thalassocracy nobody knows about. Thalassocracy, in case you are wondering, basically means a maritime empire. The height of the Chola Empire was during the reign of Rajendra I, about 1030 AD. (The one everyone knows about but doesn't really know the word in conjunction with it? Venice. Your homework today is to research and tell me your favorite Thalassocracy in the comments.)
You may have heard there's a new Species of Tyrannosaurus. Memes about it will be coming. I'm especially amused because it basically proves a very silly Far Side Comic to have been prescient.
Allosaurus. You know, I probably have enough Allosaurus memes to do a special themed dump. I should do that tomorrow.
The one dream I had was that I was a leader of a small Vining raiding band.
Should be Invisible Hand but whatever
Ughhhhhh
Yup.
Big toaster bath bomb energy
WHEEEEEEEEEEEEEE
Chomp.
Me, this last week while not having any contact with the outside world.
Incelated from society.
I'm guilty of this in THIS DUMP.
DUNDUN
One last Allosaurus Meme before tomorrow
Pippin tax!!! Today's message from Pippin: *sneezes three times* "Pippin! Beep. beep. Peep. Pippin baby. Okay."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: I love Katie Porter, but to me it seems like Schiff knows where the basic problem is
item.dc:creator: RockKickass

item.title: I've been saying I needed to take a break.
item.description: On December 29th, I was admitted into the hospital with a hypertensive crisis. I would later have a stroke during my time in the emergency room. Been in recovery ever since, and I finally get released on the 19th. Most viral edit: thank you all for such kind words! My rehabilitation has progressed smoothly over the last week, and your support means a great deal!
item.dc:creator: dannythemad
